update product
product_name = #{productName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
product_code = #{productCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
brand_id = #{brandId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
category_class_one = #{categoryClassOne,jdbcType=BIGINT},
category_class_two = #{categoryClassTwo,jdbcType=BIGINT},

category_class_four = #{categoryClassFour,jdbcType=BIGINT},
buy_count = #{buyCount,jdbcType=INTEGER},

sale_price = #{salePrice,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
market_price = #{marketPrice,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
audit_status = #{auditStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER},
up_down_status = #{upDownStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER},

store_name = #{storeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
head_image = #{headImage,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
year_code = #{yearCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
season_code = #{seasonCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
spec_id = #{specId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
freight_template_id = #{freightTemplateId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
weight = #{weight,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
product_info = #{productInfo,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
create_by = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
delete_flag = #{deleteFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
